title: NewsItem
description: A curated news item ready for publishing, composed from one or more source tweets.

news_id.description: Unique identifier for the news item.

source_items.description: Array of tweet_id references that this news item is composed from.

title.description: Headline / title of the news item.

body.description: Full body text of the news item.

format.description: Output format for the news item.

scheduled_at.description: When the news item is scheduled to be published (ISO 8601).

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the news item.
